creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Beni,

Could I apply the changes in the attached diff?

- Trim Makefile header
- Remove indefinite article from COMMENT
- Add .desktop file
- Make NLS optional
- Install .pyo files
- Don't install unneeded files in _dev directory
- Clean up do-install target

-- 
Jason E. Hale - jhale@
FreeBSD Ports Committer
KDE/FreeBSD Team
